bio: Creative and detail-oriented architect dedicated to designing sustainable, functional, and visually compelling spaces. Passionate about blending innovation with practicality to shape environments that enhance everyday living.
name: ELENA KOVACS
title: Architect & Urban Designer

projects.title: Eco-Friendly Residential Complex
projects.description: Designed a sustainable housing complex incorporating green roofs and energy-efficient systems.

projects.title: City Park Revitalization Project
projects.description: Reimagined an urban park to improve accessibility, aesthetics, and community engagement.

projects.title: Modern Office Workspace Design
projects.description: Created a flexible office layout that enhances productivity and collaboration.

community.description: Collaborated on community projects to design affordable housing solutions.
Guided students interested in architecture through portfolio development and design basics.

education.description: Advanced studies in architectural theory, sustainable design, and urban systems.
Comprehensive training in architectural design, history, and technology.

highlights: Led design development for residential and commercial projects.
Collaborated with engineers and contractors to ensure project feasibility.
Produced detailed construction drawings and documentation.
experience.description: Designing and managing architectural projects from concept through completion.

highlights: Assisted in developing design concepts and visual presentations.
Conducted site analysis and research for urban projects.
Supported senior architects in project documentation.
experience.description: Gained practical experience in architectural design and project workflows.

highlights: Created conceptual sketches and design drafts.
Built physical and digital models for client presentations.
experience.description: Supported design teams in early-stage architectural development.

sloganHeroSection: Designing spaces that inspire, function, and endure.
